path.name: Stock Entry Workflow
path.description: User enters a stock movement (Bon de Sortie, Bon de Reception, or Demande d'Achat)

step.action: Setup form appearance, populate dropdowns from ARTICLES, load SYS_STRINGS
Load document types (BS/BR/DA), articles filtered by category, localization strings
Retrieve localized UI strings from SYS_STRINGS sheet
Generate auto-reference (BS-YYMM-NNN format) by scanning MOUVEMENTS for next sequence
On article select, evaluate stock status (ROP, current stock, alert level)
Validate all inputs, write transaction, update stock, log audit, generate PDF
Unprotect MOUVEMENTS, write row, protect MOUVEMENTS
Update stock balance in ARTICLES, recalculate CMUP, validate levels
Increment/decrement stock quantity in ARTICLES sheet
Recalculate weighted average unit cost
Compare stock vs ROP, display alert if below threshold
Write audit entry to AUDIT_LOG sheet
Populate TEMPLATE_BON, export as PDF

check.description: Validates date, article, quantity, unit price before posting
Alerts if stock falls below ROP after transaction
All transactions logged with timestamp and reference

path.rollback-if-fail: mod_StockEntry_Logic:btnEnregistrer_Click contains rollback logic - deletes rows written in session if any step fails (line 694-795)

path.name: Sheet Setup Workflow
path.description: Creates/verifies all ERP sheets with headers, formatting, and protection

step.action: Display confirmation dialog, call all sheet creation subs
Create ARTICLES sheet with column headers (Code, Designation, Category, Demand, ROP, Stock, CMUP), format, protect
Create MOUVEMENTS sheet with transaction columns (Date, Code, Type, Qty, Value, Ref), format, protect
Create FORM_INPUT sheet for data entry buffer
Create STAGING_BUFFER sheet (delete if exists, recreate)
Create SYS_STRINGS sheet for localization strings
Create RECEIPT_TAG sheet with named ranges and QR code area
Create TEMPLATE_BON sheet for document PDF generation

path.sheets-modified: ARTICLES, MOUVEMENTS, FORM_INPUT, STAGING_BUFFER, SYS_STRINGS, RECEIPT_TAG, TEMPLATE_BON

check.description: All created sheets protected with MASTER_PWD
Preserves existing sheets - only creates if missing

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback - sheet creation is idempotent and non-destructive

path.name: Dashboard Refresh
path.description: Updates dashboard KPIs, critical stock table, and ABC/XYZ summary

step.action: Get/create DASHBOARD sheet, call UpdateKPIs, UpdateCriticalTable, UpdateABCXYZSummary
Read ARTICLES, calculate total articles, total stock value, articles below ROP, critical count
Retrieve safety stock for each article
Calculate annual demand from MOUVEMENTS history
Calculate ROP for each article
List articles below ROP with stock level, ROP, gap
Count articles by ABC category and XYZ classification

check.description: Dashboard refresh is read-only for source sheets, only writes to DASHBOARD

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback needed - DASHBOARD is regenerated each time

path.name: Transaction Approval Workflow
path.description: Two-tier approval process: Comptable validates, Directeur approves

step.action: Add approval columns to MOUVEMENTS if not present (Comptable_Status, Directeur_Status)
Set Comptable_Status = 2 (validated) for transaction ID
Set Directeur_Status = 3 (approved) for transaction ID
Return current approval level (1=magasinier, 2=comptable, 3=directeur)

check.description: Unprotects MOUVEMENTS with MASTER_PWD before writing approval status

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback - approval status is additive and idempotent

path.name: Batch Metrics Sync
path.description: Recalculates CMUP and ABC classification for all articles

step.action: Trigger batch refresh of all article metrics
Loop all articles, recalculate CMUP from MOUVEMENTS history, write to ARTICLES
Loop all articles, calculate consumption percentage, assign ABC category, write to ARTICLES

check.description: Unprotect/protect ARTICLES with MASTER_PWD during batch update

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback - batch operations overwrite previous values

path.name: Report Generation
path.description: Generate monthly reports or individual stock cards

step.action: Create RAPPORT_MENSUEL sheet, write header, aggregate MOUVEMENTS by article, add summary statistics, export PDF, delete temp sheet
Create FICHE_STOCK sheet for specific SKU, write all movements, calculate running balance, export PDF, delete temp sheet

check.description: Unprotect MOUVEMENTS with MASTER_PWD for reading movement data
Temporary report sheets deleted after PDF export

path.rollback-if-fail: Temporary sheets deleted on error via ErrorHandler

path.name: VBA Code Backup
path.description: Export all VBA modules to text files for disaster recovery

step.action: Create timestamped folder in workbook directory, export all VBComponents to .bas/.frm files

check.description: Requires Trust Access to VBA Project Object Model (Registry: AccessVBOM=1)

path.rollback-if-fail: Files are additive - no rollback needed

path.name: Inventory Restore from Backup
path.description: Restore ARTICLES data from a backup workbook

step.action: Open file dialog for backup workbook, validate structure, copy ARTICLES data, re-protect
Read from backup workbook ARTICLES sheet, write to current workbook ARTICLES sheet

check.description: Validates backup workbook has ARTICLES sheet before proceeding
User confirms restore before overwriting data

path.rollback-if-fail: Error handler closes backup workbook, re-protects ARTICLES, restores settings

path.name: Dashboard Button Setup
path.description: Create action buttons on DASHBOARD sheet with OnAction handlers

step.action: Create/get DASHBOARD sheet, add shapes with OnAction handlers
Button: Generate Order Report -> mod_Procurement.GenerateOrderReport
Button: Sync Metrics -> mod_SyncBridge.SyncMetricsFromLedger
Button: Restore Master Ledger -> mod_SyncBridge.RestoreMasterLedger [UNVERIFIED - may not exist]

check.description: Creates DASHBOARD sheet if not found

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback - button creation is idempotent

path.name: Receipt Tag Generation
path.description: Generate physical receipt tags with QR codes for inventory verification

step.action: Read active row from MOUVEMENTS, populate RECEIPT_TAG template, generate verify code, export PDF
Generate verification hash from receipt data

path.rollback-if-fail: No rollback - receipt tag is stateless generation
